domains.name: Career

vedic_factors.factor: 10th bhava lord strength and placement
Current Shani dasha or antardasha activation
Atmakaraka aspect or placement in 10H
Karakamsa Sun and 10th from Arudha Lagna

domains.intensity_high_signature: Benefics aspect the 10H or its ruler while MC sits in a cardinal sign with angular planets supporting status.
domains.friction_signature: Saturn-Mars hard aspect to 10H ruler or an eclipse falling on the MC/IC axis.
domains.opportunity_signature: Jupiter transit through 10H or trine to MC during a favorable 10L dasha period.

domains.name: Relationships

western_factors.factor: Descendant sign and any planet conjunct DSC

vedic_factors.factor: 7th bhava lord strength and Upapada Lagna
Shukra (Venus) dignity and Darakaraka condition
Navamsa 7H and lord of D9 lagna
Current Venus or 7L dasha or antardasha

domains.intensity_high_signature: Venus angular and well-aspected with the 7H ruler dignified or conjunct a benefic on the DSC.
domains.friction_signature: Saturn or Mars afflicting 7H ruler or Venus combust with hard aspects from outer planets.
domains.opportunity_signature: Jupiter transit through 7H or Venus-Jupiter conjunction by transit during 7L dasha.

domains.name: Family
domains.tagline: Roots, lineage, the place you return to.

western_factors.factor: IC sign and any planet conjunct IC
Cancer ruler placement and 3H ruler condition

vedic_factors.factor: 4th bhava lord strength and placement
Chandra (Moon) dignity and Matrukaraka condition
4th from Moon and aspects to Chandra Lagna
Current 4L or Moon dasha or antardasha

domains.intensity_high_signature: Moon angular and dignified with 4H ruler well-placed and aspected by Jupiter or Venus.
domains.friction_signature: Saturn or Ketu in 4H or Moon-Saturn hard aspect with the IC under transit affliction.
domains.opportunity_signature: Jupiter transit through 4H or favorable Moon dasha activating the IC axis.

domains.name: Money
domains.tagline: Resources, accumulation, what you can hold.
domains.terrain_metaphor: Mountains and Vaults — reserves, weight, slow build.

vedic_factors.factor: 2nd bhava lord strength and Dhana yogas
11th bhava lord placement and aspects
Guru (Jupiter) and Shukra (Venus) dignity
Current 2L, 11L, or Jupiter dasha or antardasha

domains.intensity_high_signature: Jupiter or Venus angular with strong 2H and 11H rulers forming a Dhana yoga.
domains.friction_signature: Saturn or Rahu afflicting 2H ruler or 8H ruler in a hard aspect to 2H during a malefic dasha.
domains.opportunity_signature: Jupiter transit through 2H or 11H during a benefic 2L or 11L dasha period.

domains.name: Inner World
domains.tagline: Shadow, dream, the part that needs the dark.

western_factors.factor: Pluto house placement and 4H ruler condition

vedic_factors.factor: 12th bhava lord strength and placement
Ketu placement and nakshatra dispositor
8th bhava lord and Rahu-Ketu axis aspects
Current Ketu, 12L, or 8L dasha or antardasha

domains.intensity_high_signature: Strong 12H or 8H emphasis with Moon-Neptune contact and Ketu activating the nakshatra of a luminary.
domains.friction_signature: Hard transits from Saturn or Pluto to natal Moon or 12L during a Ketu or 8L dasha.
domains.opportunity_signature: Jupiter transit through 12H or 8H bringing insight during a benefic 12L sub-period.

domains.name: Creativity
domains.tagline: Spark, expression, the thing that wants out.
domains.terrain_metaphor: Volcanoes — pressure, eruption, transformation through heat.

vedic_factors.factor: 5th bhava lord strength and Putrakaraka condition
Surya (Sun) and Mangal (Mars) dignity and aspects to 5H
Guru (Jupiter) placement and 9th bhava condition
Current 5L, Sun, or Jupiter dasha or antardasha

domains.intensity_high_signature: 5H ruler dignified with Sun or Jupiter angular and Venus-Mars contact supporting expressive flow.
domains.friction_signature: Saturn afflicting 5H ruler or Mars-Sun hard aspect under a malefic dasha squeezing output.
domains.opportunity_signature: Jupiter transit through 5H or 9H during a Sun or 5L dasha activating natal creative significators.
